candidate: SADDLE-PRE-WARM: separate spring parameter group with bilayer slow-load + fast-release; cyclic preload-release-reset training method inspired by stomatopod saddle bilayer spring.

per_result_judgments.title: Elastic energy storage mantis shrimp (J Exp Biol)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Source-domain biology paper on shrimp; no LLM-side overlap.

per_result_judgments.title: Emerging optimizers (NVIDIA Megatron 2025)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Survey of Shampoo/Lion/higher-order optimizers; no bilayer spring parameter group or cyclic preload-release.

per_result_judgments.title: Deep Optimizer States Interleaved Offloading (2024/10)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Memory offloading of optimizer state; not a separate spring parameter group with preload-release.

per_result_judgments.title: Cyclical LR Neural Machine Translation (2020)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Cyclical learning-rate schedule; different mechanism (LR schedule, not separate bilayer parameter group).

per_result_judgments.title: Optimizer schedules — HuggingFace
per_result_judgments.rationale: Documentation of standard optimizer schedules (warmup-cosine, WSD, cyclical); no spring parameter group.

per_result_judgments.title: LLM Research Papers 2025 part 2 (Raschka)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Literature roundup; no specific match to bilayer slow-load fast-release parameter group.

per_result_judgments.title: Bilayer Spring Parameter Group: Slow-Load Fast-Release Training (2026/03)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Direct twin: separate bilayer slow-load fast-release spring parameter group with impulsive updates; matches kw, sem, and func thresholds.

per_result_judgments.title: Cyclic Preload-Release-Reset Optimizer for Transformer (2025/11)
per_result_judgments.rationale: Cyclic preload-release-reset optimizer with separate gradient-spring parameter group; matches all three thresholds.

summary: Two of eight results (ranks 7 and 8) are direct twins of SADDLE-PRE-WARM, matching all three rules (kw>=2, sem>=0.92, func>=0.90) with distinct effect clusters (bilayer spring parameter group; cyclic preload-release-reset optimizer). The remaining six results cover unrelated optimizer surveys, schedules, and source-domain biology. Multi-cluster overlap with prior work indicates the candidate is not novel.
